chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1452 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6150/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Nisar Ahmed Memon (Storage & Enforcement Officer on behalf of Deputy Director, Food Department, Sukkur), Dildar Ali Kalwar (District Food Controller, Sukkur) and Munawar Mirani (District Food Controller, Khairpur)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG submits that this petition has become infructuous as the process of promotion and seniority from BPS-1 to 4, challenged by the petitioners in this petition, has been declared null, void and cancelled accordingly, and a new process is likely be to be set off very soon, and petitioners’ case would also be considered in equal terms. Petitioners’ Counsel is satisfied and accordingly, this petition, in above terms, is disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
